languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, вы вообще в своем уме? Как можно быть столь безответственн{mf|ым|ой}!.. Слава Императору, вы снова с нами".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, вы вообще в своем уме? Как можно быть столь безответственн{mf|ым|ой}!.. Слава Императору, вы снова с нами".
"Лорд-капитан, вы вообще в своем уме? Как можно быть столь безответственн{mf|ым|ой}!.. Слава Императору, вы снова с нами".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, вы вообще в своем уме? Как можно быть столь безответственн{mf|ым|ой}!.. Слава Императору, вы снова с нами".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind!? How could you be so reckless?.. Emperor be praised, you woke up..."
"Lord Captain, are you out of your mind!? How could you be so reckless?.. Emperor be praised, you woke up..."
"Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."

languages.text: "Herr Hauptmann, sind Sie verrückt geworden? Wie konntest du nur so leichtsinnig sein!.. Der Imperator sei gepriesen, du bist zu uns zurückgekommen..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."

languages.text: "Seigneur Capitaine, avez-vous perdu la tête ? Comment avez-vous pu être aussi imprudent ? Empereur soit loué, vous êtes revenu à nous..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."

languages.text: "船长大人，你疯了吗？你怎么能如此鲁莽！皇帝陛下，您回来了......"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."

languages.text: "Señor Capitán, ¿está usted loco? ¿Cómo puedes ser tan imprudente? Alabado sea el Emperador, volviste con nosotros..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."

languages.text: 「キャプテン閣下、気は確かですか？よくもそんな無謀なことを！...皇帝よ、よくぞ戻ってきてくださいました..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, aklınızı mı kaçırdınız? Nasıl bu kadar pervasız olabilirsin! İmparatora şükürler olsun, bize geri döndün..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you out of your mind? How could you be so reckless!.. Emperor be praised, you came back to us..."
